subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath unlocked the gate of utterance through the Name whereby all creation hath been shaken, and hath adorned the temple of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح باب البیان بالاسم الذی به اضطرب الامکان و زین هیکل من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
